name: N-4 node eval fixtures: negative fixture .js files are non-empty so they exercise the detector against a clean baseline
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/node"/g-node-*/negative; do [ -d "$d" ] || continue; for f in "$d"/*.js; do [ -s "$f" ] || missing=$((missing+1)); done; done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo non_empty 1>&2
